Pricing

Simple plans, premium experience

No hidden fees. Cancel anytime.

Starter

For individuals exploring events.

$0

  • Browse all events
  • Up to 2 tickets / month
  • Basic notifications
  • Community support
Most popular

Growth

For exhibitors building presence.

$49/month

  • Unlimited tickets
  • Exhibitor dashboard
  • Lead capture (1k/mo)
  • Email & chat support
  • Custom booth page

Scale

For organizers running expos.

$199/month

  • Multi-event management
  • Advanced analytics
  • Hotel & travel module
  • QR check-in suite
  • Priority 24/7 support
  • API access
Eventra

The premium platform for hosting, managing and scaling world-class events.
